service.name: RapidAPI Hub
service.description_for_ai: API marketplace with 40,000+ APIs. One API key, one SDK to access: weather, sports, finance, social media, entertainment, translation, and thousands of niche APIs. Simplifies multi-API integration. Use when you need an API for a specific niche not covered elsewhere.

auth.how_to_get: Register at https://rapidapi.com — free tier on most APIs
auth.cost: Free tier on most APIs. Premium APIs vary.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Access any of 40,000+ APIs on RapidAPI using their host and endpoint. Use when you need a specific niche API like: sports scores, stock news, recipe generators, IP intelligence, image processing, etc.

X-RapidAPI-Host.description: API host from RapidAPI e.g. v3.football.api-sports.io

params.description: Query parameters specific to the API

agent_hints.discovery: Search RapidAPI.com for specific API names. Each API has its own host and endpoint structure.
agent_hints.free_tiers: Most APIs on RapidAPI have generous free tiers. Check each API page for limits.
